title: platanthera cristata
intro: Platanthera cristata, also known as the crested orchid or lesser green orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Platanthera cristata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Platanthera cristata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from its roots, leaves, or flowers.
